    parseEngineeringValue(String) - Static method in class lcr.view.RealTimeChartPanel
    Helper parser utility translating engineering multiplier tokens into raw numeric bounds.
    pauseSync(long) - Method in class lcr.business.MeasurementBusiness
    Requests a temporary delay pause blocking configurations sweeps during specific operational windows.

    PrimaryParameter - Enum Class in lcr.enums
    Representation of the primary electrical measurement parameters supported by the instrument, defining the core physical property under evaluation.
    process(List) - Method in class lcr.business.BiasSweepWorker
    Updates the UI chart using published data points on the Event Dispatch Thread.
